# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.
# Category: api_gateway_security

---
_format_version: "1.1"
name: my-microservices-api
hosts:
  - "my-domain.com"
uris:
  - "/my-microservice1/*"
  - "/my-microservice2/*"
methods:
  - GET
  - POST
upstream_url: http://myservice1.example.com:8080
preserve_host: true
strip_uri: false
plugins:
  - name: rate-limiting
    config:
      minute: 5000
  - name: response-ratelimiting
